sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The block moved UP 3, RIGHT 3, and DOWN 4 (only 10 actions executed, not 12). Looking at the image, the block is now in the middle area. Let me check the current position and continue moving DOWN to reach the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check block position
print("=== Block position ===")
for i in range(25, 50):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ob':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")
            break

# Check white cross
print("\n=== White cross ===")
for i in range(44, 54):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ww':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")

# Check the area
print("\n=== Current area ===")
for i in range(25, 50):
    row = ascii[i][34:58]
    print(f"{i}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
